programmes.show_description: Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Music
Gus is in denial about the imminent demise of Globelink. Helen wrestles with single motherhood and her sexuality, while Sally tries to discover the secret of eternal youth.
Gus is still in denial, George meets Henry's niece, and overcomes his fear of flying. Sally goes in search of an alternative income and Helen discovers she has no secrets.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Jack Hargreaves demonstrates that a horse harness is more than a just pile of straps. He then visits dog trainers, John and Mary Holmes.
Flash and friends are captured by the clay people, and Flash poses as a Martian pilot to trick Azura into revealing her secrets.
The case of Charlotte Bryant, who was hanged for poisoning her husband with weed-killer.
Stephen investigates where the Steyning Line branched from the main track, takes to the skies in a helicopter, and explores surviving bridges and riverside paths. S01E03
Jack Hargreaves witnesses 30,000 sheep go on sale at a Wessex sheep fair, while at the river he goes looking for the little grebe.
After 'Hank' Abbotts detective career collapses, he joins the British Army. If theyd known what kind of recruit hed be, their welcoming embrace mightve turned into tightly clenched fists.
Alex Dyke presents an hour of bubblegum pop and cheesy tracks to make you feel good.
A mystery planet declares war on the Moonbase.
The case of Charlotte Bryant, who was hanged for poisoning her husband with weed-killer.
Shop steward Harry threatens a strike; Fred scrambles to keep the factory running and his creditors at bay.
Bill is taught a lesson about the flaws in family life when Faith expects him to play the heavy stepfather.
In an attempt to spice up their marriage, Jane tries a disastrous new look and Laurence buys some 'marital aids'.
The Champions are enlisted to help when the body of a top Pentagon official is found in Wales.
A mystery planet declares war on the Moonbase.
Francis Coudrill presents a unique blend of animation and the European Western in this TV classic as Hank Rides Again. 4/13

Sally is very taken with her wealthy fiance, and so is Gus. George plays hard to get and Helen is in mourning.
Henry finds new fame as an icon of youth TV, while Dave dabbles in the underworld and gambles with his future.
A psycho's Aztec sacrifice fetish fuels murder, madness, and sleaze in 1970s New Orleans, as cops chase carnage through disco lights and blood-soaked streets in Jack Weis's cult trashterpiece.

programmes.show_name: Bloodbath at the House of Death
programmes.show_description: Black comedy with Kenny Everett,, Vincent Price & Pamela Stephenson. Six scientists probe creepy Headstone Manor, site of a past massacre where 18 guests were mysteriously killed

Ming realises the futility of continuing his assault and Flash's intention of freeing the Clay People is misinterpreted, and he must fight for his life.
The story of Madeleine Smith, a respectable spinster who was accused of killing her lover in 19th-century Edinburgh. The case was famously found to be "not proven".
Stephen follows the River Adur, uncovering wartime relics and hidden railway history-including rare track near the old Shoreham Toll Bridge. S01E04

Fred eyes a better position but politics at work and home complicate his plans.
Hannah and Joe are predictably indifferent to their mothers announcement but absolutely nothing can stop Bill and Faith enjoying their wedding day Can it?
Jane despairs after Laurence admits he loves another woman. He proposes an open marriage; horrified, she instead tries to make him jealous.
Racketeers target the Grand.

Ken and Harry go looking for an amateur boxer who has deserted the army.
Time is running out for Globelink. During the station's dying days, Sally prepares for her final bulletin and married bliss, whilst Dave and Henry are at daggers drawn.
A brave new world beckons for the Globelink News staff when media mogul Sir Roysten Merchant takes over the station. And the team must grapple with the complexities of covering Northern Ireland.
Mary Millington is Queen of the Blues - Mayfair's most famous stripper. She must use her pleasing assets to defuse the ongoing criminal activity, surrounding the nightclub she performs in.
A stylised cult Dracula tale starring Udo Kier as a count who must consume the blood of virgins to survive, courting a desperate Italian noble family while servant Mario plots his downfall.
